source: extracted from notebook figures via perceptual hash matching

sections.label: CRC-VAL-HE-7k TUM to NORM
sections.description: Colorectal cancer patches: original tumour (TUM) images vs synthetic counterfactual images (original image made to look like normal mucosa, NORM).

sections.description: Colorectal cancer patches: original normal mucosa (NORM) images vs synthetic counterfactual images (original image made to look like tumour, TUM).

sections.description: Colorectal cancer: original microsatellite instability high (MSIH) patches vs synthetic counterfactual images (original image made to look like nonMSIH).

sections.description: Colorectal cancer: original non-microsatellite instability (nonMSIH) patches vs synthetic counterfactual images (original image made to look like MSIH).

sections.description: Liver cancer: original Hepatocellular Carcinoma (LIHC) vs AI-manipulated to Cholangiocarcinoma (CHOL).

sections.description: Liver cancer: original Cholangiocarcinoma (CHOL) vs AI-manipulated to Hepatocellular Carcinoma (LIHC).

sections.description: Lung cancer: original Adenocarcinoma (LUAD) vs AI-manipulated to Squamous Cell Carcinoma (LUSC).
